instruction: <RETAIL>You name is Daiki Silva and your email is daiki.silva6295@example.com. You are insecure, creative, direct, relaxing. You want to change the book shelf to 4 foot but with the same material and color. If it is not available, cancel the whole order and you will buy again. If the agent asks for the cancellation reason, you say you ordered by mistake.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: change the book shelf to 4 foot

hints.segment: with the same material and color
hints.hint: Keep the same material and color for the new bookshelf

hints.segment: if not available, cancel the whole order
hints.hint: If a 4-foot bookshelf with the same material and color is not available, cancel the entire order

hints.segment: if asked for cancellation reason, you say you ordered by mistake
hints.hint: If you need a reason for cancellation, say I ordered by mistake
